content: I've been running my own wedding planning agency for 10 years, but I'm feeling a bit burnt out. I'm thinking of making a change.
That's understandable, Dana. Running a business can be very demanding. What are your thoughts on what you'd like to do next?
I'm not sure yet. I've been thinking about starting an online course to teach others about wedding planning. I've also been knitting a lot lately and I'm thinking of starting a knitting blog.
That sounds like a great idea. Teaching others about wedding planning could be very rewarding. And knitting is a great hobby to have. Do you have a favorite type of yarn to work with?
I love working with wool yarn. It's so soft and warm.
Wool is a great choice. It's very versatile. Have you thought about what you'll focus on in your online course?
I'm thinking of focusing on destination weddings. I've planned so many weddings in beautiful locations around the world.
That sounds like a great niche. Destination weddings can be very romantic. Have you thought about how you'll market your online course?
I'm not sure yet. I'll have to figure it out as I go. I'm just taking things one day at a time.
That's a good approach. It's always better to take things one step at a time. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you're passionate about?
I'm also interested in surfing. I've been trying to get out on the waves at least once a month.
That's great. Surfing is a wonderful way to stay active and connected with nature. Have you thought about how you'll balance your surfing hobby with your online course and knitting blog?
I'm not sure yet. I'll have to figure it out as I go. But I'm excited to start this new chapter in my life.
That's a great attitude to have. It's always exciting to start a new chapter in life.
